title: Daily Briefing — Jun 05
headline: Tech leadership stays strong but cracks are appearing under the surface—patience, react, don’t predict.
body: Big picture: Market’s still levitating, with SPY holding above its 20 MA (747.02) and VIX chilling at 15.4. XLK technology streaks ahead as sector leader (RS=124.7), but we’re seeing lag in XLY (Discretionary) and XLC (Communication), plus a cluster of heavyweight names like NVDA ($218.66) and GOOGL ($372.19) stuck below their 20 MA—so the leadership is getting thinner. Fear & Greed at 55 is just regular greed, no extreme signal.

Rotation: Energy (XLE), Materials (XLB), Industrials (XLI), and Healthcare (XLV) are all moving from elevated risk to improvement, suggesting a classic rotational play from stretched tech into cyclicals and defensives. Financials (XLF $52.39) have triggered above all key MAs—watch for confirmation as the canary.

Contrarian/risk: Several flagship techs (NVDA, GOOGL, AMZN) are trading below 20 MA—per rule R006, treat these as exit/avoid zones until momentum returns. Commodities and crypto (CL=F, GLD, SLV, BTC-USD) are rolling over hard, a sign that flows are pulling back from risk. Abundance mindset—don’t chase these moves, find the next setup.
callout_body:
SPY support: 747.02 (20 MA)
NVDA resistance: 219.18 (20 MA), watch for daily close
GOOGL resistance: 386.85 (20 MA)
XLF support: 51.5 (20 MA)
XLE pivot: 58.27 (20 MA), continuation or reversal
BTC-USD: 73237.89 (20 MA), major failure zone
Watch for daily closes above/below 20 MA across flagships
action_items: Trim or exit any longs in NVDA, GOOGL, AMZN until price reclaims 20 MA
Rotate attention to XLE, XLI, XLV, XLF as relative strength improves and MAs trigger
closing_quote: If it's in the press, it's in the price. Next trade—abundance mindset, always.
